title: Amarna Letters: The Kings Write to Pharaoh
description: The diplomatic archive of Akhenaten — letters from Babylon, Assyria, and desperate vassal rulers.
introduction: The diplomatic archive of Akhenaten — letters from Babylon, Assyria, and desperate vassal rulers.

translation.text: Say to the king of Egypt, my brother: All goes well with me. Now concerning the gold — send me much gold. In your land, gold is like dust.
